## Which layer does this touch?

- [ ] `apps/` (web or api)
- [ ] `packages/` (shared core/memory)
- [ ] `agents/`
- [ ] `providers/`
- [ ] `workflows/` (orchestration graph / event definitions)
- [ ] `docs/`
- [ ] infra (`docker-compose.yml`, `.github/`, `Makefile`, etc.)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make pre-commit` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated (see docs/standards.md testing strategy)
- [ ] If this changes an Agent's input/output schema, `docs/agents.md` and/or `docs/api.md` updated
- [ ] If this adds/replaces a dependency, `docs/open-source-landscape.md` updated with license check
- [ ] If this is an architecture-level decision, an entry was added to `docs/decisions.md`
